title: Oeeta
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
'''Oeeta''' was a [[Boma (species)|Boma]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] residing in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], on [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]]. She was affectionate with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], and served him, [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] [[Boma-mush]], a form of gruel.

==Behind the scenes==
As one of the short-lived changes found in the [[The Star Wars first draft|first draft]], "Oeta" was considered as a name for a name for the [[Prince/Legends|prince]] named [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs]] in the rough draft.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1975-01-XX -->''[[Adventures of the Starkiller, Episode I: The Star Wars]]''
*<!-- 1997-09-08 -->''[[Star Wars: The Annotated Screenplays]]''
